2604.15771.title: Skill-RAG: Failure-State-Aware Retrieval Augmentation via Hidden-State Probing and Skill Routing
2604.15771.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a foundational paradigm for grounding large language models in external knowledge. While adaptive retrieval mechanisms have improved retrieval efficiency, existing approaches treat post-retrieval failure as a signal to retry rather than to diagnose -- leaving the structural causes of query-evidence misalignment unaddressed. We observe that a significant portion of persistent retrieval failures stem not from the absence of relevant evidence but from an alignment gap between the query and the evidence space. We propose Skill-RAG, a failure-aware RAG framework that couples a lightweight hidden-state prober with a prompt-based skill router. The prober gates retrieval at two pipeline stages; upon detecting a failure state, the skill router diagnoses the underlying cause and selects among four retrieval skills -- query rewriting, question decomposition, evidence focusing, and an exit skill for truly irreducible cases -- to correct misalignment before the next generation attempt. Experiments across multiple open-domain QA and complex reasoning benchmarks show that Skill-RAG substantially improves accuracy on hard cases persisting after multi-turn retrieval, with particularly strong gains on out-of-distribution datasets. Representation-space analyses further reveal that the proposed skills occupy structured, separable regions of the failure state space, supporting the view that query-evidence misalignment is a typed rather than monolithic phenomenon.
2604.15771.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）已成為將大型語言模型與外部知識結合的基礎範式。雖然自適應檢索機制提高了檢索效率，但現有方法將檢索後失敗視為重試的信號，而不是診斷——這使得查詢與證據不匹配的結構性原因未得到解決。我們觀察到，持續檢索失敗的顯著部分並非源於缺乏相關證據，而是查詢與證據空間之間的對齊差距。我們提出了Skill-RAG，一個具備失敗感知的RAG框架，將輕量級隱藏狀態探測器與基於提示的技能路由器結合。探測器在兩個管道階段控制檢索；當檢測到失敗狀態時，技能路由器診斷根本原因並在四種檢索技能之間進行選擇——查詢重寫、問題分解、證據聚焦，以及針對真正無法簡化的情況的退出技能——以在下一次生成嘗試之前糾正不匹配。跨多個開放域問答和複雜推理基準的實驗表明，Skill-RAG顯著提高了在多輪檢索後仍然存在的困難案例的準確性，尤其在分佈外數據集上獲得了特別強勁的增益。表示空間分析進一步揭示，所提出的技能佔據了失敗狀態空間中的結構化、可分離區域，支持查詢與證據不匹配是一種類型化而非單一現象的觀點。
2604.15771.author: Kai Wei et.al.
2604.15771.authors: Kai Wei, Raymond Li, Xi Zhu, Zhaoqian Xue, Jiaojiao Han, Jingcheng Niu, Fan Yang
